h1: How to Share Projects in PCBWay Community

headings.text: How to Share Projects in PCBWay Community
Two ways to share PCB projects:
3D Printing files can also be shared in PCBWay community now, the process is similar to that of PCB.

sections.heading: How to Share Projects in PCBWay Community
sections.text: Blog > How to Share Projects in PCBWay Community How to Share Projects in PCBWay Community by: PCBWay Aug 12,2022 15474 Views 0 Comments Posted in Help Center PCB 3D Printing Community Two ways to share PCB projects: 1.Enter PCBWay community (https://www.pcbway.com/project/shareproject/) and find the Create a project button. 2.Once upload a PCB file in our website, there will be a Share&Sell button in your order, just click it and share your file. 3D Printing files can also be shared in PCBWay community now, the process is similar to that of PCB. 1.Enter Create a project page, and then select CNC I 3D Printing Project as the figure above shows. 2.Once upload a 3D printing file in our websit...

sections.heading: Two ways to share PCB projects:
sections.text: Two ways to share PCB projects: 1.Enter PCBWay community (https://www.pcbway.com/project/shareproject/) and find the Create a project button. 2.Once upload a PCB file in our website, there will be a Share&Sell button in your order, just click it and share your file. 3D Printing files can also be shared in PCBWay community now, the process is similar to that of PCB. 1.Enter Create a project page, and then select CNC I 3D Printing Project as the figure above shows. 2.Once upload a 3D printing file in our website, there will be a Share&Sell button in your order, just click it and share your file. Besides, if you would like to add 3D printing file in a PCB project, then please add it in Attachm...

sections.heading: 3D Printing files can also be shared in PCBWay community now, the process is similar to that of PCB.
sections.text: Two ways to share PCB projects: 1.Enter PCBWay community (https://www.pcbway.com/project/shareproject/) and find the Create a project button. 2.Once upload a PCB file in our website, there will be a Share&Sell button in your order, just click it and share your file. 3D Printing files can also be shared in PCBWay community now, the process is similar to that of PCB. 1.Enter Create a project page, and then select CNC I 3D Printing Project as the figure above shows. 2.Once upload a 3D printing file in our website, there will be a Share&Sell button in your order, just click it and share your file. Besides, if you would like to add 3D printing file in a PCB project, then please add it in Attachm...
